title: IPTF Pattern Frontmatter (v2)
description: Schema for pattern document frontmatter in IPTF Map. All v1 aliases have been removed. Structured context_differentiation, crops_context, post_quantum, related_patterns, open_source_implementations, and meta-pattern support are the canonical shape.

maturity.description: Technology maturity. research (paper only), concept (spec, no code), testnet (PoC/pilot), production (mainnet with real usage).

type.description: Pattern kind. 'meta' patterns aggregate sub_patterns and may omit crops_profile, Protocol, and Example. Defaults to 'standard' when absent.

last_reviewed.description: Last review date in YYYY-MM-DD format

works-best-when.description: Conditions when this pattern is optimal

avoid-when.description: Conditions when to avoid this pattern

standards.description: Standards this pattern relies on (ERC-20, EIP-7573, ISO-20022, etc.).

related_patterns.description: Cross-references to other patterns. Slugs match patterns/pattern-<slug>.md.

requires.description: Hard dependencies. Can't implement this without them.

alternative_to.description: Competing approach to the same problem.

sub_patterns.description: Children of a meta-pattern. Required when type: meta.

crops_summary.description: One-line CROPS trade-off summary for this child

context_differentiation.description: How the pattern applies differently in I2I vs I2U. Required when context: both (enforced by validator).

i2i.description: How this plays out between institutions

i2u.description: How this plays out for user-facing deployments; what extra protections are needed

crops_profile.description: CROPS dimension assessment. Use the string 'n/a' for meta/evaluation patterns that do not implement privacy directly.

o.description: Openness: source availability, open standards, exit paths, forkability. The 'O' in CROPS — broader than just open source.

p.description: Privacy: full (private from everyone), partial (selective disclosure required), none (public or institution sees all)

s.description: Security: strength of guarantees (cryptographic assumptions, decentralization, trust model)

crops_context.description: Narrative context for each CROPS dimension. Explains where the badges drift up or down in practice.

visibility.description: Optional four-slot visibility matrix for transaction-level patterns: who sees what.
